subject: current-affairs
description: Broader International Current Affairs MCQs for PPSC, FPSC, NTS, CSS & PMS.

mcqs.q: The acronym 'BRIC' was coined in 2001 by economist Jim O'Neill of which firm?
mcqs.explanation: Jim O'Neill coined 'BRIC' at Goldman Sachs in 2001. South Africa joined in 2010 making it BRICS.

mcqs.q: The first ever BRIC Summit was held in 2009 in:
mcqs.explanation: The first BRIC Summit was held in Yekaterinburg, Russia, in 2009.

mcqs.q: South Africa joined BRIC — making it BRICS — in:
mcqs.explanation: South Africa formally joined BRIC at the end of 2010 (first BRICS Summit attended in 2011).

mcqs.q: Which of the following countries joined BRICS on 1 January 2024?
mcqs.explanation: Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran and the UAE joined BRICS on 1 January 2024.

mcqs.q: Indonesia became a full BRICS member on:
mcqs.explanation: Indonesia became a full BRICS member on 7 January 2025.

mcqs.q: The headquarters of the BRICS New Development Bank (NDB) is in:
mcqs.explanation: The NDB is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

mcqs.q: The current President of the BRICS New Development Bank is:
mcqs.explanation: Former Brazilian President Dilma Rousseff has been NDB President since 2023.

mcqs.q: The 16th BRICS Summit (2024) was hosted by:
mcqs.explanation: The 16th BRICS Summit was held in Kazan, Russia in October 2024.

mcqs.q: The 17th BRICS Summit (2025) was hosted by:
mcqs.explanation: The 17th BRICS Summit was hosted by Brazil in Rio de Janeiro in July 2025.

mcqs.q: The G-20 was established in:
mcqs.explanation: The G-20 was established in 1999 as a finance-ministers forum after the Asian financial crisis.

mcqs.q: After the African Union's induction in 2023, the G-20 has how many members?
mcqs.explanation: Since 2023 the G-20 = 19 countries + the European Union + the African Union.

mcqs.q: The African Union was admitted as a permanent member of the G-20 at which summit?
mcqs.explanation: Indian PM Modi admitted the African Union to the G-20 at the New Delhi 2023 summit.

mcqs.q: The G-20 Summit 2024 was hosted by:
mcqs.explanation: The G-20 Summit 2024 was hosted by Brazil in Rio de Janeiro.

mcqs.q: The first ever G-20 Summit on the African continent was held in 2025 in:
mcqs.explanation: South Africa hosted the G-20 Summit 2025 in Johannesburg — the first ever in Africa.

mcqs.q: Which of the following countries is NOT a member of the G-20?
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan is NOT a G-20 member.

mcqs.q: The G-20 Summit 2026 will be held in:
mcqs.explanation: The G-20 Summit 2026 will be hosted by the United States.

mcqs.q: COP29 (UN Climate Conference 2024) was held in:
mcqs.explanation: COP29 was held in Baku, Azerbaijan, in November 2024.

mcqs.q: COP30 (UN Climate Conference 2025) was held in:
mcqs.explanation: COP30 was held in Belém, Brazil, in November 2025.

mcqs.q: The Paris Agreement on climate change was adopted in:
mcqs.explanation: The Paris Agreement was adopted at COP21 in December 2015.

mcqs.q: According to the World Happiness Report 2025, the world's happiest country is:
mcqs.explanation: Finland topped the World Happiness Report 2025 — its 8th consecutive year at #1.

mcqs.q: Per the Global Peace Index, the most peaceful country in the world is consistently:
mcqs.explanation: Iceland tops the Global Peace Index every year since 2008.

mcqs.q: On the Global Gender Gap Report 2025, the country topping the list is:
mcqs.explanation: Iceland has topped the WEF Global Gender Gap Report every year since 2009.

mcqs.q: On the Press Freedom Index 2025, the top-ranked country is:
mcqs.explanation: Norway leads the RSF World Press Freedom Index 2025.

mcqs.q: On the Corruption Perceptions Index 2024, the world's least corrupt country is:
mcqs.explanation: Denmark topped the CPI 2024 (released January 2025).

mcqs.q: As of 2024, the world's most populous country is:
mcqs.explanation: India overtook China in 2023 to become the world's most populous country.

mcqs.q: On the Global Firepower Index 2025, the world's strongest military is:
mcqs.explanation: The United States ranks #1 on the Global Firepower Index 2025, followed by Russia and China.

mcqs.q: On the Global Firepower Index 2025, Pakistan ranks approximately:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan typically ranks around 9th on the Global Firepower Index.

mcqs.q: On the Global Innovation Index 2024, the top-ranked country is:
mcqs.explanation: Switzerland has topped the Global Innovation Index for over a decade.

mcqs.q: The current Managing Director of the International Monetary Fund (IMF) is:
mcqs.explanation: Bulgarian economist Kristalina Georgieva is the IMF Managing Director (since 2019, second term from 2024).

mcqs.q: The current President of the World Bank Group is:
mcqs.explanation: Ajay Banga has been President of the World Bank Group since 2 June 2023.

mcqs.q: The current Director-General of the World Trade Organization (WTO) is:
mcqs.explanation: Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala (Nigeria) is WTO Director-General since 2021 (re-appointed for a 2nd term in 2024).

mcqs.q: The current Director-General of the World Health Organization (WHO) is:
mcqs.explanation: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus (Ethiopia) has been WHO DG since 2017 (second term 2022–27).

mcqs.q: The current NATO Secretary-General is:
mcqs.explanation: Former Dutch PM Mark Rutte became NATO Secretary-General on 1 October 2024.

mcqs.q: The current Secretary-General of the OIC is:
mcqs.explanation: Hissein Brahim Taha (Chad) is OIC Secretary-General since November 2021.

mcqs.q: The current Secretary-General of the Economic Cooperation Organization (ECO) is:
mcqs.explanation: Asad Majeed Khan of Pakistan became ECO Secretary-General in 2024.

mcqs.q: The current Prime Minister of the United Kingdom is:
mcqs.explanation: Sir Keir Starmer (Labour) became UK Prime Minister on 5 July 2024.

mcqs.q: The current President of Mexico, the country's first woman president, is:
mcqs.explanation: Claudia Sheinbaum became Mexico's first woman President on 1 October 2024.

mcqs.q: The current President of Indonesia is:
mcqs.explanation: Prabowo Subianto became Indonesia's President on 20 October 2024.

mcqs.q: The current Prime Minister of Japan (as of late 2024) is:
mcqs.explanation: Shigeru Ishiba became Japan's PM on 1 October 2024.

mcqs.q: The current Vice President of the United States is:
mcqs.explanation: JD Vance is the Vice President of the United States since 20 January 2025.

mcqs.q: The Crown Prince and Prime Minister of Saudi Arabia is:
mcqs.explanation: Mohammed bin Salman (MBS) is Crown Prince and Prime Minister of Saudi Arabia.

mcqs.q: The current President of the United Arab Emirates is:
mcqs.explanation: Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan (MBZ) is the President of the UAE since 2022.
